name: Vegetable Skillet Meal
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil peeled potatoes until they are not quite done. Cool and then cut them into cubes.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet and sauté the onion. Remove the onion and the potatoes from the pan and set aside temporarily.
3. Heat the oil in the same skillet and add the peppers, sautéing briefly.
4. Add the broccoli to the skillet and continue sautéing until tender.
5. Add the mushrooms (if using) and sauté for a few more minutes.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes and sauté briefly.
7. Return the onion mixture to the skillet and season with soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
8. Turn off the heat and top with cheese if desired.
Note: Vegetable broth may be substituted for some of the butter and oil if desired.
